scripts.broker:start: corepack pnpm --filter review-broker-server exec tsx src/cli/start-broker.ts
scripts.broker:smoke: corepack pnpm --filter review-broker-server exec tsx src/cli/start-broker.ts --db-path ./.tmp/s01-smoke.sqlite --once
scripts.broker:mcp: corepack pnpm --filter review-broker-server exec tsx src/cli/start-mcp.ts
